purpose: Repair the H-G1 regime manifest after Databento EQUS.MINI rejected 2023-03-13 and 2023-03-22 SPY bar repair because the dataset starts at 2023-03-28.

data_policy.purchase_scope: No new purchase for this v2 repair rerun; reuse already-downloaded OPRA statistics/OI and existing local quote/SPY bar cache.

selection_rules.date_source: The original v1 12-date manifest after removing dates with impossible SPY bar repair under Databento EQUS.MINI availability.
selection_rules.exclusion_policy: Remove 2023-03-13 and 2023-03-22 only because the provider rejected SPY bar repair as data_start_before_available_start; do not remove dates for poor gamma results.

volatility_buckets.high: same-day VIX close >= 25 or explicitly selected stress window

selection_rules.macro_flag: high_importance_macro=true when official macro calendar has at least one same-day high-importance event
selection_rules.split_policy: Preserve both in_sample and oos coverage from the original v1 manifest. This v2 repair is diagnostic only and cannot claim the original 12-date stability target.
selection_rules.replacement_policy: Do not buy replacement dates in this v2 repair. If 10-date v2 still fails only because date count is insufficient, create a separate v3 replacement-date manifest before any new paid OI pull.

excluded_dates.reason: Databento EQUS.MINI SPY bars unavailable before 2023-03-28; original manifest had quote/OI data but no repairable underlying bars.
Databento EQUS.MINI SPY bars unavailable before 2023-03-28; original manifest had quote/OI data but no repairable underlying bars.

repair_notes.forbidden_claim: Passing this v2 repair diagnostic would not prove full H-G1 validity; it only isolates whether the remaining blocker is computed-Greeks bucket coverage rather than missing underlying bars.

selected_dates.selection_reason: Train-period low-volatility CPI date retained from v1.
Train-period normal-volatility no-high-importance-macro control date retained from v1.
Train-period PCE date with normal/elevated VIX retained from v1.
Train-period low-volatility no-high-importance-macro year-end control date retained from v1.
Existing OI/enrichment probe date retained from v1.
OOS very-low-volatility no-high-importance-macro control date retained from v1.
OOS volatility-spike stress date retained from v1.
OOS high-VIX follow-through date retained from v1.
OOS PCE macro date with elevated normal VIX retained from v1.
OOS high-volatility FOMC macro date retained from v1.
